nasb.text: Surely all the men who have seen My glory and My signs which I performed in Egypt and in the wilderness, yet have put Me to the test these ten times and have not listened to My voice,

esv.text: none of the men who have seen my glory and my signs that I did in Egypt and in the wilderness, and yet have put me to the test these ten times and have not obeyed my voice,

cnv.text: 這些見過我的榮耀，和我在埃及與曠野所行的神蹟的人，仍然試探了我這十次，不聽從我的話；
